title: Rick's Custom Potions
description: Unique potion textures for vanilla Minecraft using 25w03a item data
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b0702cf2b420841c2362e961f0af877374daa0c.png)
 
# Unique potion textures for vanilla Minecraft. 

All potion textures are animated and should allow an at-a-glance identification of the potion and its function. Also, they just look good.

### this will be part of my main pack but if you just want the potions you can use this.

**(Optifine NOT needed) (works only in 25w03a or future versions)**
